ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "lon" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country or region the location belongs to */,
  "city" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the location */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the location data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_country FOREIGN KEY ("country") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "edges" (
  "edge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each edge */,
  "loc_d_id" INTEGER /* ID of the destination location */,
  "loc_o_id" INTEGER /* ID of the origin location */,
  "con_d" INTEGER /* Connectivity status of the destination location */,
  "con_o" INTEGER /* Connectivity status of the origin location */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance between the origin and destination locations */,
  "travel_time" TEXT /* Estimated travel time between the locations */,
  "transport_mode" TEXT /* Mode of transport */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the edge data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("edge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_edges_loc_d_id FOREIGN KEY ("loc_d_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_edges_loc_o_id FOREIGN KEY ("loc_o_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each country or region */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country or region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the country */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the country data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., urban planner, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the user's information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the location or edge */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location being accessed */,
  "edge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the edge being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the location or edge was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or device */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access session */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the access log was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_edge_id FOREIGN KEY ("edge_id") REFERENCES edges ("edge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_connectivity" (
  "con_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each connectivity status */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "con_status" INTEGER /* Connectivity status of the location */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the connectivity status was updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the connectivity status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("con_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_connectivity_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)
